name: Easter Acrylic Decorative Bunny Figural Blue - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of whimsy to your Easter decor with this charming Easter Acrylic Decorative Bunny Figural Blue - Spritz™. Crafted from durable polystyrene, this delightful piece stands at 5.375 inches tall, making it a perfect addition to any indoor setting. Its vibrant color and playful design capture the spirit of the season, offering a cheerful accent to your home. Ideal for tabletops or shelves, it brings a festive flair to your celebrations.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
